name: Summer Fun Nature Series
blurb: Our own rotating series of talks — a fresh topic and speaker every few weeks through the season, on the cool corners of Florida nature and gardening.

name: UF/IFAS Horticultural Series
blurb: In partnership with UF/IFAS Manatee County Extension — expert horticulture classes at the park, a new topic and instructor each session, for a nominal fee. Sign-up required.

name: Adult Park Workdays
blurb: Roll up your sleeves with fellow volunteers to keep the park beautiful. Some are work-and-donuts mornings; others wrap up with a Galleria lunch, speeches, and prizes.

name: Bright Futures High School Volunteer Program
blurb: Work weekly with high school students who are earning community service hours as part of Florida's Bright Futures Scholarship Program.
